name: Alterity Therapeutics Limited
analysis: ATH has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 36% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$0.5500. Trade idea: entry A$0.5600, stop A$0.3911, target A$1.0668 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
